text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O, who competed fiercely
against Mejiro Ardan at the Japanese Derby, is
hospitalized following an injury and temporarily
withdraws from racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two promise to meet again on the turf one
day, with Mejiro Ardan wishing to become a rival
worthy of Sakura Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I share with her two branching options for future
goals. One entails her racing against Yaeno
Muteki again in the Kikuka Sho, the final race of
the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other option is to have her compete in the
decider of all medium-distance races, the autumn
Tenno Sho. Not only will it feature senior-year
participants, it'll also put her up against top
racers like Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While either choice will be an uphill battle for
Mejiro Ardan, it would also be an opportunity for
growth. As her trainer, the decision I come to is...
choice_data_list: To enter the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The goal race is now the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having decided on the path leading to the
Kikuka Sho, we vow to forge ahead toward our
next battle with fresh determination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having decided on the path leading to the
autumn Tenno Sho, we vow to forge ahead
toward our next battle with fresh determination!
